description: math.tools is a website offering math calculators, number conversions, tables, and related numeric utilities. It also publishes a Numbers API for programmatic access to number facts, conversions, spelling, primes, pi digits, and number checks.
summary: math.tools exposes one documented HTTP REST surface: the Numbers API at https://api.math.tools, described by an OpenAPI spec and authenticated with an `X-Mathtools-Api-Secret` header.
